title: CIBN Confers Fellowship On Dapo Olagunju, MD Of JP Morgan Nigeria & West Africa - FinancialEDGE
description: Dapo Olagunju, the Managing Director of JP Morgan Nigeria and West Africa has been bestowed with the honorary Fellowship of the Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN). Olagunju was conferred with the highest honour for bankers during the Institute’s 2025 investiture ceremony held on Saturday, at the Banquet Hall, Wole Soyinka Centre for Culture
html: Dapo Olagunju, the Managing Director of JP Morgan Nigeria and West Africa has been bestowed with the honorary Fellowship of the Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN).
